name: kotatsu-project-companion
description: Project-local Codex companion for maintaining the Kotatsu Android app, parser fork, and project-specific safety rules.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain the Kotatsu app, parser fork, and repo rules
interface.longDescription: Project-local companion plugin for this Kotatsu workspace. It captures the repo layout, the local parser fork workflow, the Olympustaff/TEAMXNOVEL source mapping, the permanent blocked-content policy, and the validation commands we should keep using in future sessions.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Kotatsu change and tell me which app or parser modules it touches most.
Trace this broken source through the local parser fork and suggest the safest fix.
Validate this Kotatsu task with the right parser tests, unit tests, and Gradle build.
